title: schedonorus remotiflorus
intro: Schedonorus remotiflorus, also known as feather bentgrass, is a type of grass native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, with studies suggesting that it has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schedonorus remotiflorus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as bronchitis and digestive issues.
